qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_def_cont as oi_def_cont, t0.c_def_cont as c_def_cont, t0.d_def_cont as d_def_cont, SEC.policy, t0.c_def_cont as CODE, t0.d_def_cont as TEXT FROM LIQ29_DEF_CONT as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.DefinicionesContables.DEF_CONT\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_def_cont LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_def_cont asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_def_cont as oi_def_cont, SEC.policy FROM LIQ29_DEF_CONT as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.DefinicionesContables.DEF_CONT\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_def_cont LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_def_cont asc')/ROWS/ROW

key.msg: Ya existe una definicion contable con el codigo ingresado.
key.name: Key_2

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.DefinicionesContables.DEF_CONT.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.DefinicionesContables.DEF_CONT.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LIQ29_DEF_CONT.oi_def_cont) as CNT from LIQ29_DEF_CONT Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LIQ29_DEF_CONT.oi_def_cont={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LIQ29_DEF_CONT.d_def_cont,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LIQ29_DEF_CONT.c_def_cont,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

key.msg: Ya existe un grupo con la etiqueta ingresada para la definicion contable actual.
key.name: Key_2

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.DefinicionesContables.ASIENTO_CON.QUERY
